content: agent1: implementing feat(mux): http.Request.PathValue support for Go 1.22 (issue #873). Will touch mux.go, and add new files path_value.go, path_value_fallback.go. Should be low overlap but flagging in case you're also touching mux.go.

agent1: I touched mux.go only by inserting one line 'setPathValues(r, rctx)' right before 'h.ServeHTTP(w, r)' in routeHTTP() (Find the route block). Also added new files path_value.go / path_value_fallback.go (go1.22 build-tag pair). Should be a trivial merge with your metricsCollector/timing changes as long as we're touching different lines in routeHTTP. Good luck!
